description: A portrait-format graphic with a black background. White serif text at the top reads Border Patrol agents left a partially blind refugee in a parking lot. Centered below is a portrait photograph of an older man wearing a knit skullcap and a purple polo shirt, looking slightly to the side. Beneath the photo, more white serif text reads He was found dead five days later. A small credit line reads Family handout / Reuters.
notable_text: Border Patrol agents left a partially blind refugee in a parking lot. He was found dead five days later.; Family handout / Reuters
